parameters.subject: ={{ $json.emailSubject }}
parameters.text:
={{ $json.emailBody }}

—
This message was sent on behalf of {{ $vars.BUSINESS_NAME }}.
If you have already paid, please disregard this message.

meta.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Copy webhook URL → set as N8N_WEBHOOK_URL in PayPilot .env.local
2. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to n8n variables (get from console.anthropic.com)
3. Add SMTP credentials for email sending
4. Add Twilio credentials (optional, for SMS on invoices >21 days overdue)
5. Add Postgres credentials → Supabase dashboard → Settings → Database → Connection string
6. Set n8n variables: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, SENDER_EMAIL, BUSINESS_NAME, TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER
7. Model used: claude-opus-4-6 via Anthropic Messages API
8. Activate the workflow
